mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pm :: PmCache :: selectById */ c.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_ct.code_label AS cache_type_cd_nm FROM pm_cache c LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = c.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ct ON cd_ct.code_grp = 'CACHE_TYPE' AND cd_ct.code_value = c.cache_type_cd WHERE c.cache_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(c.*) /* base.ec.pm :: PmCache :: selectPageCount */ FROM pm_cache c
